parameters.subject: 🚨 New Civic Complaint - Immediate Attention Required
parameters.message:
=

New Complaint Received

A new civic issue has been reported that requires your attention.

  • Complaint ID: {{ $json.complaintId }}
  • Category: {{ $json.category }}
  • Priority: {{ $json.priority }}
  • Location: {{ $json.location }}

Description:

{{ $json.complaintText }}

This is an automated alert from CivicX Platform.

parameters.subject: ✅ Complaint Submitted Successfully - CivicX
parameters.message:
=

Hello,

Your complaint has been successfully forwarded to the concerned authority.

Complaint Summary:

  • ID: {{ $("Validate Input").item.json.complaintId }}
  • Category: {{ $("Validate Input").item.json.category }}
  • Status: Sent to Authority

Thank you for contributing to a better city!

— The CivicX Team

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: "Email sent successfully to authority and user notified" }) }}
